title: BTA Whitelist
description: Whitelist support for offline BTA! servers
body:
___
___ Want to play on an offline server with friends but don't want to use authentication mods? This mod fixes the issue where offline players can't be added to the whitelist. ❗ _Note that using a whitelist on servers with offline mode enabled doesn't prevent people from changing their nicknames to those that are whitelisted, thereby gaining access to other accounts on the server._ ___ ### How to use it? Everything is easy, just use the `/whitelist` command as intended, it'll automatically add or remove nicknames to the custom whitelist file. ___ ### Installation 1. Download mod version which supports your BTA! version. 2. Make sure your server using Babric, so it can support mods. 3. Put mod into your server's `/mods` folder. 4. Restart your server! ___ _This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!_
